problem_statement:
Given a non-negative integer n, determine whether it is odd. Return true if the number is odd, otherwise return false.
    A number is odd if it is not divisible by 2 (i.e., n % 2 != 0).

examples.explanation:
7 is not divisible by 2. Hence, it is odd.


Example 2:
10 is divisible by 2. Hence, it is not odd.
